name: Da Qiao

skills.name: Law of Infinity
skills.description: Grants a Movement Speed boost to herself and a nearby teammate. Thetides created by her skills deal extra damage when they overlap

skills.name: Leaping Koi Tide
skills.description: Launches and damages enemies in a line ahead, leaving a tide that dealscontinuous damage. Gains Movement Speed when using skills.

skills.name: Sea of Fate
skills.description: Conjures a magic circle that teleports her and an ally within it back to Baserestoring their Mana and granting a Movement Speed boost

skills.name: Severing Surge
skills.description: Launches and damages enemies along a line, leaving a tide that deals

tips: Da Qiao (Support): Tier A on international ranked — 49.1% WR.
Build core: Knowledge Gem, Boots of the Arcane, Crimson Shadow - Radiance.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 49.1%, pick 0.92%, ban 0.49%, popularity tier A.
Counters Luna, Mozi · Weak into Arke, Han Xin.

faqs.question: Is Da Qiao good in current season?
faqs.answer: Da Qiao is Tier A Support with 49.1% win rate, 0.92% pick rate, and 0.49% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Da Qiao build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Knowledge Gem, Boots of the Arcane, Crimson Shadow - Radiance, Venomous Staff, Ominous Premonition, Succubus Cloak. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Da Qiao?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Da Qiao: Arke, Han Xin. Da Qiao is strong into Luna, Mozi.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Luna, Mozi. Countered by: Arke, Han Xin.
